scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix admin-dashboard run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start" "npm --prefix admin-dashboard run start"
